sourceAnnotation.sourceLabel: Teleporter do Metrô Inimigo (Leva ao teleporter acima) (No subsolo, entre a Azul e a Verde)
sourceAnnotation.validationNote: Timestamp duplicates event 85 and is out of chronological order after 24:40. Likely intended value: 24:50-24:55, but preserve original until verified against video.

observations: Original window shares the same timestamp as E085.
Frames show surface-level teleporter/nearby context rather than resolving the underground enemy teleporter label.
Corrected candidate follows E087 in source order and shows a teleporter-sign/indoor context.
The frame group is visually distinct from the original duplicated E085 window.

neighboringEvidence.E087: E087 shows enemy secret-shop teleporter context immediately before the corrected candidate window.
neighboringEvidence.E085: E085 shares the original E088 timestamp and therefore remains a duplicate-timestamp conflict.

limitations: This resolves visual support for the candidate window only; it does not rewrite the CSV or validate demo alignment.
